notClaimed: route-proven original PC34 screenshots for pass304 states
remainingComparatorBlockers: original PC34 viewport capture remains route-unproven for pass304 required states
metadata bridge does not yet perform per-pixel blit/crop comparison against original captures
D4 rows remain object-stack/content events only and are intentionally excluded from wall bitmap comparison
scope: Bridge pass300 DM1 V1 wall pixelRegion descriptors to pass305 GRAPHICS.DAT wall-record checksums for indices 93..107.

sourceAnchors.claim: ReDMCSB wall draw calls select G0698_puc_Bitmap_WallSet_Wall_D3LCR and Graphic558 wall frame descriptors before drawing into the viewport bitmap.
pass300 pixelRegion rect/sourceClip descriptors are layout-zone based viewport regions, not raw screenshot crops.
pass305 decodes/checksums the wall-set records required by pass304 without dumping bitmap bytes.
